title: CopperBulbEarly
description: Port the copper bulb from MC 1.21.4 to MC 1.20.1 and ensure compatibility with schematics and world upgrades.
body:
# Copper Bulb Early
[简体中文](https://github.com/chenjunfu2/copper-bulb-early-1.20.1/blob/master/README.md)  
This is a mod that perfectly backports the **``Minecraft 1.21.4 Copper Bulb``** to **``Minecraft 1.20.1``**, bringing the complete copper bulb features and advancements back to **``Minecraft 1.20.1``**.  
Because the mod uses the vanilla namespace and data format, it is compatible with copper bulbs in higher-version schematics loaded by the Litematica mod. Additionally, upgraded worlds can be recognized and preserved by higher versions.  

## Description
This project is modified from [Rczlin-bulb-early-1.20.1](https://github.com/Rczlin/bulb-early-1.20.1)  

**Compared to the original ported mod:**
- Fixed issue where copper bulbs could not oxidize due to random tick events
- Fixed resource files to use vanilla namespace for resource pack compatibility
- Added porting of all copper bulb variants
- Added porting of related advancements

## Requirements
**Game Version**: **``Minecraft 1.20.1``**  
**Loader Version**: **``Fabric 0.14.22+``**  
**Fabric API**: **``0.92.3+``** (since 0.92.3 fixes a bug that may cause issues with this mod)  
**Multiplayer**: Must be installed on both **``Server``** and **``Client``**  
**Singleplayer**: Only need to install on **``Client``**  

## Incompatibilities
- **BBOR (Bounding Box Outline Reloaded)** – This mod has a serious bug that causes abnormal mining time increases for this mod's blocks and may lead to blocks not dropping any items when broken. Since BBOR is no longer maintained, this incompatibility will not be fixed.  
  
## Note
- If installed only on the server and not on the client, issues such as **“Missing mod”** or **“Block ID cannot be resolved”** may occur when connecting to this server.  
- If installed only on the client, you **can still join a server that does not have this mod installed** (the client-side mod blocks will not take effect on that server).
